name: Dota 2
description: A free-to-play team-based game set in the world of Dota. Featuring heroes, creeps, towers and more.

name: Counter-Strike 2
description: Counter-Strike 2 is a free-to-play tactical first-person shooter that builds upon more than two decades of behind-the-scenes innovation in the competitive gaming space.

name: Cyberpunk 2077
description: An open-world, action-adventure story set in night city, a megalopolis obsessed with power, glamour and body modification. Play as V, an outlaw on an epic quest to save yourself in a dark future where neural implants define your identity.

name: Elden Ring
description: THE NEW FANTASY EPIC. Rise, Tarnished, and let grace guide thee. A new adventure begins. Elden Ring is a collaboration between FromSoftware and George R. R. Martin.

name: Apex Legends
description: Discover an ever-expanding roster of powerful Legends, lethal weapons, and dynamic environments designed to reward player creativity and team play. Squad up and compete.

name: The Elder Scrolls Online
description: Play any way you want in The Elder Scrolls Online, the award-winning online RPG from Bethesda Softworks. Explore a vast world and play how you want to play.

name: FINAL FANTASY XIV Online
description: A Realm Reborn. Dive into the world of FINAL FANTASY XIV, an ever-expanding fantasy epic and award-winning MMORPG.

name: Grand Theft Auto V
description: When a young street hustler, a retired bank robber, and a terrifying psychopath find themselves entangled with some of the most frightening and deranged elements of the criminal underworld.

name: Sid Meier's Civilization V
description: Create, discover, and download custom civilizations, rules, and more for Civilization V.

name: Baldur's Gate 3
description: Baldur's Gate 3 is a story-rich, party-based RPG set in the world of Dungeons & Dragons. Create your character and experience an epic tale of fellowship and betrayal.

name: Forspoken
description: Break free. Forspoken is a magical adventure game featuring parkour, spell craft, and stunning visuals.
